ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pandemic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time of the report */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region being reported (e.g., Hubei) */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases requiring hospitalization */,
  "icu_admission_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases requiring ICU admission */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string containing age distribution data */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string containing gender distribution data */,
  "geographical_data" TEXT /* JSON string containing geographical data (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes regarding the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pandemic_reports_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pandemic_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Hubei) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* JSON string containing coordinates (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., correction, addition) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES pandemic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_reports" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding pandemic report */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases at the time of death report */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* JSON string containing underlying health conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES pandemic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related report */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message regarding the update */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report update, data validation) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES pandemic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report generation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* JSON string containing the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_integrations" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API integration */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API (e.g., COVID-19 API) */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* URL endpoint for the API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* Authentication key for accessing the API */,
  "api_status" TEXT /* Status of the API integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding report */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Historical number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Historical number of deaths */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Historical number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Historical number of active cases */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Historical vaccination rate */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Historical number of tests conducted */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Historical test positive rate */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Historical hospitalization rate */,
  "icu_admission_rate" REAL /* Historical ICU admission rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES pandemic_reports ("report_id")
)
